# Beyond the Wall Playbooks

# ![][image1]

# **Folk of the Village**

## [**The Would-Be Knight**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1fqTD3GN2GZCu9KFT_Qub2OrCQYrwTNjSun3c64y1JY0/edit?usp=sharing) ([Warrior](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Gfz6AWBT9YV4741jKzJ57ULkBAVPPT2KGw3P_PEImwA/edit?usp=sharing))

You grew up sitting wide-eyed round the fire, listening to stories of knights and heroes who slew dragons and saved the kingdom. The other children liked those stories as well, but you lived for them, and you promised yourself that you would grow to be a great knight.

## [**The Village Hero**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Tw2SIL_q1WK3J0I4AAHt3RCITeq7nCZBN0Mb9CLwTBA/edit?usp=sharing) ([Warrior](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Gfz6AWBT9YV4741jKzJ57ULkBAVPPT2KGw3P_PEImwA/edit?usp=sharing))

While you are still young, you have made quite the name for yourself in the village. The common folk look to you to solve their problems and protect them from dangers.

## [**The New Watcher**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/10JBTK9IcWWnYv76EDb1TdDzdyTgV3xN-6yaResfdYM4/edit?usp=sharing) ([Warrior](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Gfz6AWBT9YV4741jKzJ57ULkBAVPPT2KGw3P_PEImwA/edit?usp=sharing))

The village is protected by a small band of watchmen, and you are the most recent recruit. While the watch has only two or three members, you are always on guard against dangers from beyond the village walls. The watch are respected in town and asked to solve disputes, investigate mysteries, keep the peace, and judge the festival competitions.

## [**The Untested Thief**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/18AbnUq4-6eBerQ0Bt7pXt0FCTxj1Zz8Ald0yN-QW3C0/edit?usp=sharing) ([Rogue](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hqnGwPBb32iw9slcMuqDpbtAyOECXJuFHWpap4MUBfo/edit?usp=sharing))

Some young would-be adventurers get by with their sword arm or with words of power in the language of magic, but you need neither. The world is full of things to see and enjoy, and your fingers are more than quick enough to let you have what you like.

## [**The Young Forester**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1h6HX1KY_nsJktQIUZ5jcYiN2MfS6mVn6MPkmav6p4wU/edit?usp=sharing) ([Rogue](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hqnGwPBb32iw9slcMuqDpbtAyOECXJuFHWpap4MUBfo/edit?usp=sharing))

Forager, woodsman, or guardian, it takes a brave soul to wander the woods. You go where few in your village would dare, and, moreover, you feel at home in those places. You know every twig and leaf for miles around, and all your friends look to your guidance when leaving home.

## [**The Self-Taught Mage**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1s9PmSoO-oH8-jrh2RSm7P2HhSNDjmM0oNK-koyelS5k/edit?usp=sharing) ([Mage](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1WhnGf_y2JgIX6hCNns1kEvqBU_mMNNj3YMIwQV3Q0ck/edit?usp=sharing))

You were always a bright child, and loved stories of ancient wizards and sorceresses who mastered the arcane arts. Unfortunately, there was no one around to teach you such things. In fact, sometimes you wondered if the stories of magic were even true. When you came of age, you found an ancient tome and decided to find out for yourself.

## [**The Witch’s Prentice**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uGR25eVzyTindF4rdscksQEXePpvSpbSFL6PrmBNTsI/edit?usp=sharing) ([Mage](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1WhnGf_y2JgIX6hCNns1kEvqBU_mMNNj3YMIwQV3Q0ck/edit?usp=sharing))

You were always a bright child, and loved stories of ancient wizards and sorceresses who mastered the arcane arts. Unfortunately, there was no one around to teach you such things. In fact, sometimes you wondered if the stories of magic were even true. When you came of age, you found an ancient tome and decided to find out for yourself.

## [**The Devout Acolyte**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1s9PmSoO-oH8-jrh2RSm7P2HhSNDjmM0oNK-koyelS5k/edit?usp=sharing) ([Mage](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1WhnGf_y2JgIX6hCNns1kEvqBU_mMNNj3YMIwQV3Q0ck/edit?usp=sharing))

You were always a bright child, and loved stories of ancient wizards and sorceresses who mastered the arcane arts. Unfortunately, there was no one around to teach you such things. In fact, sometimes you wondered if the stories of magic were even true. When you came of age, you found an ancient tome and decided to find out for yourself.

## [**The Local Performer**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uGR25eVzyTindF4rdscksQEXePpvSpbSFL6PrmBNTsI/edit?usp=sharing) (Bard)

You grew up obsessed with ancient stories and songs, the oral history of your people. As a child, the stories told around the hearth at the inn and by traveling minstrels seemed more real to you than your own daily struggles in the village. Now that you have come of age, you keep the old stories, and your neighbors have come to respect your craft.

# **The Nobility**

## [**The Nobleman’s Wild Daughter**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1BlZNiwrWRt1xaZarg4cM_V2e-QyK6hi46FL3Hjkfw1E/edit?usp=sharing) ([Warrior](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Gfz6AWBT9YV4741jKzJ57ULkBAVPPT2KGw3P_PEImwA/edit?usp=sharing))

You were never quiet and demure, as some would have wished you to be. You grew up on tales of heroes, mighty deeds, and great battles. You learned the ways of war in secret and can now best any lad in the manor.

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
